summary: Extended doctor.go to add a `sources` block in the report with explicit per-upstream probes for Locatieserver (`/free?q=...`) and Kadaster Location API (`/conformance`), each with status, base path, role, and impact-on-failure.
reason: The base-URL probe (`GET /`) doesn't distinguish which of the two PDOK services is up. When one upstream is degraded the user needs to know which commands still work. The new `doctor --json` output exposes `sources.locatieserver` and `sources.kadaster_location_api` keys so agents can reason about partial availability.
validated_outcome: `pdok-location-pp-cli doctor --json` includes per-source status, role, and impact strings.
